item.title: Machining a New Cylinder Rod | CAT 18M
item.description: From 2.5" induction‑hardened chrome bar to a finished cylinder rod, Kurtis machines, welds, and fits the salvaged ball socket end. What makes tight tolerances and a clean finish essential for lasting performance?

media:content.media:description: From 2.5" induction‑hardened chrome bar to a finished cylinder rod, Kurtis machines, welds, and fits the salvaged ball socket end. What makes tight tolerances and a clean finish essential for lasting performance?
